name: TrustLLM Benchmark

desired_end_state.notes: Captured content is the publisher's public landing/overview page describing the framework. The framework's underlying per-control/per-requirement text (where one exists) lives in publisher-hosted PDFs, GitHub repos, or member-only portals that would each need a separate acquisition path.
